summary: No-ship: the family matcher can classify unrelated model IDs by substring, which violates the unmatched-id FAST clamp and parameter-stripping invariants.

findings.title: Family matcher accepts arbitrary substrings, so unrelated model IDs can bypass the FAST clamp
findings.recommendation: Replace the raw includes checks with a family-token matcher that only accepts opus/sonnet/haiku as model-id tokens or known Claude family segments after stripping a trailing [1m]. Add regression cases for false positives such as an ID containing opus inside another word, plus the env-overridden exact-configured collision case to pin exact match precedence.
